recommendations.title: Ava's Possessions
recommendations.overview: Ava is recovering from demonic possession. With no memory of the past month, she must attend a Spirit Possessions Anonymous support group to figure out what happened. Ava's life was hijacked by a demon, now it's time to get it back.

recommendations.title: Ava

recommendations.title: Hunting Ava Bravo
recommendations.overview: Billionaire sportsman Buddy King unwinds by hunting human captives on his remote mountain estate. But his latest victim, Ava Bravo, is no easy target.

recommendations.title: We Bury the Dead
recommendations.overview: After a catastrophic military disaster, the dead don't just rise - they hunt. Ava searches for her missing husband, but what she finds is far more terrifying.

recommendations.title: I Do...Knot

recommendations.title: Hilda and the Mountain King
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Family, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: When Hilda wakes up in the body of a troll, she must use her wits and courage to get back home, become human again — and save the city of Trolberg.

recommendations.title: The Visitor from the Future

recommendations.title: Ready Player One
recommendations.overview: When the creator of a popular video game system dies, a virtual contest is created to compete for his fortune.
